templates.name: Weekly Audit Review
templates.description: Dispatches a claude session to summarize last-week audit anomalies (denied/error rows) and post the summary to the operator's inbox vault note.

nodes.prompt: Summarize the audit rows in n1.body, highlighting any outcome='denied' or 'error' rows by caller_id. Output as Markdown bullets.

templates.name: Host Health Check (broadcast)
templates.description: Broadcasts `uptime`, free disk and last 5 lines of journalctl across every host tagged 'prod'. Aggregates results into a single Markdown report.

nodes.prompt: Run on each prod host: `uptime; df -h /; journalctl -n 5 --no-pager`. Aggregate into a Markdown table.

templates.name: Quarterly Secret Rotation
templates.description: Rotates a fixed list of secrets (GH_TOKEN, OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_TOKEN), records the rotation in the inbox note, and emits a workflow.completed webhook.
